{{Quote|The Separatist leader San Hill panics as the Republic Army advances. But Count Dooku has sent powerful new enemy, Durge, onto Muunilinst. This vicious bounty hunter leads a band of mercenaries toward the heart of the Republic's forces. The Republic Army now faces a challenge greater than ever imagined against this tenacious villain and his forces.|StarWars.com summary|<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/chapter/4.html|text=''Clone Wars'': Chapter Four (small)}}</ref>}}
"'''Chapter 4'''" is the fourth episode of the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' animated television series, and the fourth episode in [[Clone Wars: Season One|Season One]] and [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|Volume One]]. Directed by [[Genndy Tartakovsky]], the episode originally aired on [[Cartoon Network]] on [[November 12]], [[2003]].

==Plot summary==
As the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] forces advance, panic spreads throughout the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|Banking Clan]] headquarters. [[San Hill/Legends|San Hill]] angrily asks the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] commander, [[Durge/Legends|Durge]], why [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] bothered appointing him to command when he hasn't done anything. Durge's reply consists of choking San Hill.

On the outskirts of [[Harnaidan]], [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] report to [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] that the assault against the core of the [[City/Legends|city]] is going well. However, no sooner have they reported than they catch sight of approaching [[IG lancer droid/Legends|IG lancer droids]], led by Durge. The clones are quickly taken down, with their [[Self-Propelled Heavy Artillery|SPHA-Ts]] destroyed. Durge releases a victory howl.

==Continuity==
The [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume One]] [[Star Wars home video releases|DVD]] swaps this chapter with "[[Chapter 5 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|Chapter 5]]". In [[2005]], certain Hasbro lightsaber toys included a DVD that collected Chapter 4 and "[[Chapter 1 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|Chapter 1]]."

This episode takes place around the same time "Chapter 3" occurred, told through the point of view of the IGBC and the Republic.
